# Google Analytics

This page explains how Google Analytics can be used to measure website performance and understand visitor behavior.

## Purpose of Google Analytics

Google Analytics helps marketers track how people find and interact with a website. For a portfolio website, this information can show which pages attract the most attention and how visitors move through the site.

## Metrics I Would Track

| Metric | Why It Matters |
|----|----|
| Page views | Shows which pages are being visited |
| Traffic sources | Shows where visitors came from |
| Engagement rate | Shows how actively visitors interact with the site |
| Average engagement time | Shows how long visitors spend on pages |
| Most visited pages | Shows which content is most effective |

## Application to My Portfolio

For this portfolio website, I would use Google Analytics to understand whether visitors are engaging with my professional profile, project page, dashboard, and presentation.

The most important pages to track would be:

- Home page
- Marketing Projects page
- Dashboard page
- Presentation page

## Example Insights

If the Marketing Projects page receives the most views, that may suggest visitors are most interested in my project experience.

If visitors leave quickly from the Home page, I may need to improve the introduction, layout, or call-to-action.

If the Dashboard page receives strong engagement, that may show that visitors are interested in my marketing analytics skills.

## Marketing Takeaway

Google Analytics allows marketers to make data-driven improvements. By reviewing website traffic and engagement data, I can improve my portfolio and better understand what content is most valuable to visitors.

## Google Analytics Certification

I have completed the Google Analytics 4 (GA4) certification, which demonstrates my understanding of website tracking, user behavior analysis, and marketing performance metrics.

:::: {style="text-align: center;"}
::: {style="text-align: center;"}
<img src="GA4_Certification.png" width="500"/>
:::
::::
